name: liminal-agents
description: Three-agent deliberation for psychological state. Architect, Witness, and Contrarian read your state, disagree by design, and the correction becomes data. Built for Cerebral Valley x Anthropic Built with Opus 4.7 hackathon.

anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key (starts with sk-). Only required if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set in your shell environment.
